violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener and slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken stock, vegetable stock, and potato soup were placed hot in the walk-in cooler covered with a plastic wrap and a lid over it. -Chicken stock observed at 49 degrees Fahrenheit, vegetable stock observed at 79 degrees Fahrenheit, and potato soup observed at 57 degrees Fahrenheit. -Per PIC, vegetable soup was cooled down 1 hour prior to this inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed. -Staff removed the lid and plastic wrap from the containers to allow for rapid cooling in the walk-in cooler. The vegetable soup was moved to the walk-in freezer to allow for rapid cooling. -Vegetable soup was observed at 64 degrees Fahrenheit 30 minutes after the initial observation. -Establishment shall keep a cooling log for foods in the cooling process. -Cooling log must be maintained for 1 week and emailed to inspector. -Cooling log provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Soups in the self-service area are lacking a list of ingredients for the foods. Foods in the self-service area must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, and major food allergen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The presence of droppings is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed underneath/behind kitchen equipment and underneath shelving in the dry storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. -Establishment must sweep all areas observed with droppings and monitor for activity. If droppings observed after cleaning, establishment must get pest control to do a full assessment/evaluation of the facility. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Some light bulbs in the kitchen area were not in good repair. Bulbs shall be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The coating of the ceiling in the storage area is in poor repair. Coating observed peeling at the time of this inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Working containers of various dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: -The hot hold steam units were being used as ice baths for cold holding foods. -All cold drawer units were observed non functional. -The 3 door reach-in in the downstairs kitchen was observed non functional. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
The floors in the dry storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
